description: Set up the email newsletter infrastructure in Magento. Configure the newsletter settings to allow guest subscriptions and disable the confirmation requirement. Create a newsletter template named 'Holiday Collection 2024' with the subject 'Discover Our Holiday Collection - Exclusive Early Access', sender name 'NestWell Home', and sender email 'newsletter@nestwell-home.com'. The template content must be HTML including an <h1> heading 'Holiday Collection', a paragraph, and a list of at least 3 items. Subscribe Alice Johnson, Bob Smith, Carol Williams, David Brown, and Emma Davis to the newsletter.

metadata.template_subject: Discover Our Holiday Collection - Exclusive Early Access
